title: habenaria andamanica
intro: Habenaria andamanica is a species of orchid native to the Andaman and Nicobar Islands, belonging to the family Orchidaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as treating fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as providing relief from rheumatism and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
